name: cc
description: Claude Code Plugin for Codex. Codex plans, supervises, steers, verifies, and accepts Claude Code work.

interface.longDescription: Use Claude Code from inside Codex with authorization-aware diagnosis and implementation modes, todo checkpoints, live tool events, steering, workspace policy checks, independent Codex acceptance, tracked reviews, results, and logs.
defaultPrompt: Use Claude Code to review my current changes through $cc:review
Use Codex-supervised Claude Code to investigate or fix this issue through $cc:rescue
Show the Claude Code tool log through $cc:log
